provides.label: Local GPU (image-to-video on your own card)

fps.label: fps (backend may pin its own; e.g. CogVideoX = 8)

flow_shift.label: motion (flow shift; LTX door only, ignored otherwise)

ui.blurb: Renders on your own GPU -- no cloud, no per-render cost; quality scales with your card and chosen backend (12GB LTX floor, 16GB CogVideoX).
limits: Runs whichever local backend you point it at: LTX (12GB floor) or CogVideoX (16GB floor); bigger cards add headroom
Short i2v clips (draft / standard / final tiers); resolution + cadence set by the backend
One clip at a time (a consumer card runs a single i2v job)
